title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

items.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: Note electoral reform is not the same as PR. Burnham has talked in the past about the benefits of using the supplementary vote system in mayoral elections but that's not a proportional system.
items.content_text: Note electoral reform is not the same as PR. Burnham has talked in the past about the benefits of using the supplementary vote system in mayoral elections but that's not a proportional system.
